summary: Security audit testing: tenant isolation across all 10 fixed endpoints. 22/22 backend security tests passed (100%). Frontend admin dashboard loads cleanly with no errors.
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 security features verified: tenant isolation is properly enforced across store, audit logs, promo codes, platform endpoints, and file uploads.

Note: _resolve_store_tenant_id returns None only for platform admins (not unauthenticated users). Unauthenticated GET /api/products without partner_code returns DEFAULT_TENANT_ID ('automate-accounts') products — this is by design, not a vulnerability.
Upload IDOR fix confirmed: file_uploads.find_one now filters by tenant_id, preventing cross-tenant file access.
Audit log IDOR fix confirmed: get_audit_log adds tenant_id filter for non-platform admins — fake IDs return 404.
Promo code cross-tenant rejection confirmed: all 3 checkout locations (bank-transfer, session, free) include tenant_id filter in promo_codes.find_one.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin dashboard loads, tenant admin login works, no JS errors)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up a test promo code (TESTISOLATION*) in the platform tenant to verify cross-tenant promo rejection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tenant isolation security fixes verified and passing: (1) store.py early-return guard (tid=None for platform admin), (2) audit-logs IDOR fix with tenant_id filter, (3) promo code tenant scoping in all 3 checkout flows, (4) documents update/readback with tenant_id, (5) users readback with tenant filter, (6) uploads IDOR fix. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_security_tenant_isolation.py (22 tests, all passing). Admin dashboard loads correctly for tenant admin (Mayank, partner_code=AA).
rca_of_issue: Security hardening pass verified successfully. All previously identified vulnerabilities (cross-tenant product/category leakage, audit log IDOR, promo code cross-tenant use, document/user readback after update without tenant scope, upload IDOR) have been fixed and verified with automated tests.
